changes.value:
## What
Create a `ValidatorMcpServer` in `avp-common/src/validator/mcp_server.rs` that starts a minimal HTTP MCP server exposing only two tools: `code_context` and `validator_files` (read-only).

This server runs on a random port, managed by the `AvpContext`. It uses the existing `McpServer` infrastructure from `swissarmyhammer-tools` but registers only the two tools.

**Files:**
- `avp-common/src/validator/mcp_server.rs` (new)
- `avp-common/src/validator/mod.rs` (add module)

**Approach:**
- Reuse `McpServer` from swissarmyhammer-tools but create it with a custom registration function that only registers `code_context` + `validator_files`
- Start it on a random port (like the existing side HTTP server does)
- Return the port so callers can construct the MCP URL
- The server shares the existing code-context index (same `.code-context/` database)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `ValidatorMcpServer::start(work_dir) -> Result<(u16, JoinHandle)>` starts and returns port
- [ ] Only `code_context` and `validator_files` tools are registered
- [ ] Server is accessible at `http://localhost:{port}/mcp`
- [ ] Health endpoint responds at `http://localhost:{port}/health`
- [ ] Shares existing code-context index

## Tests
- [ ] Integration test: start server, list tools, verify only 2 tools present
- [ ] Integration test: call code_context detect projects through the server
- [ ] `cargo test -p avp-common`
Create ValidatorMcpServer â€” minimal MCP server for validator agents
